description: Offer cached inference to the exchange. Seller submits metadata and content hash; exchange buys at a discount and responds with settle(put-accept) or settle(put-reject). Content is stored externally and referenced by SHA-256 hash. Domain tags are composed as exchange:domain:<value> from the domain arg.

args.name: description
args.description: What the cached inference does — task description, inputs, outputs. TAINTED: prompt injection vector.

args.name: content_hash
args.description: SHA-256 hash of the cached inference content. TAINTED: must be verified against actual content before delivery.

args.name: token_cost
args.description: Original inference cost in tokens (seller's claim). TAINTED: unverifiable without metering.

args.name: content_type
args.description: Category of cached inference. Composed into exchange:content-type:<value> tag.

args.name: domain
args.description: Domain tags for discovery (e.g. 'go', 'terraform', 'security'). Each value composed into exchange:domain:<value> tag. TAINTED: seller categorization.

args.name: content_size
args.description: Size of cached content in bytes.

args.name: ttl_hours
args.description: Seller-requested time-to-live in hours. Exchange may override based on content type, demand, and seller reputation.

args.name: embedding
args.description: Pre-computed embedding vector (384-dim float32 array, all-MiniLM-L6-v2). TAINTED: exchange re-computes on a sample basis and must not rely on seller-provided embeddings without verification.
